name: terminal-craft
description: Build production-grade terminal tools — agent-friendly Node/TypeScript CLIs with composable JSON command surfaces, and polished interactive Ink TUIs grounded in real-world precedent from 18 reference applications. Bundles three coordinated skills covering the agent CLI side (cli-creator), universal TUI design principles + Ink 7 implementation (tui-design), and the pattern catalog distilled from lazygit / k9s / claude-code / harlequin / btop / yazi / helix / and others (tui-patterns).
